309 I5350_TOURT_CD I5350_TOURT_CD I5350 Tourettes Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had an active diagnosis of Tourette's Syndrome in the last seven days. -=Not assessed/no information

310 I5400_SZRE_CD I5400_SZRE_CD I5400 Active Diagnoses: Seizure Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had an active diagnosis of a seizure
